brand.name: SoundQuest
nav.anonymousDataLocal: Data stored locally in this browser
nav.guestSignInHint: Sign in to save your data for good. As a guest, your data only stays in this browser and won't sync to other devices.
footer.buyMeACoffeeAria: Support the project on Buy Me a Coffee (opens in new tab)
landing.heroHeadline: Bring Your RPG Sessions to Life with Sound
landing.heroSupporting: SoundQuest is a soundboard designed for tabletop RPG sessions. Play ambience, music, and sound effects instantly to create immersive adventures.
landing.socialProofHeadline: Built for tabletop RPG players and Game Masters
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need at the table
landing.featuresSubheading: Designed for speed and immersion so you can focus on the game.
landing.feature1Desc: Play ambient sounds and music instantly during RPG sessions.
landing.feature2Desc: Upload and organize your own sound effects and tracks.
landing.feature3Desc: Control the atmosphere of every scene without interrupting the game.
landing.feature4Desc: Trigger sounds instantly during live gameplay.
landing.feature5Desc: Create multiple soundboards (scenes) and switch between them per encounter or location.
landing.feature6Desc: Try the soundboard without creating an account.
landing.howSubheading: Get started in three simple steps.
landing.howStep1Desc: Add audio from URLs, upload your own files, or search Freesound.
landing.howStep2Desc: Organize sounds into scenes and label them for quick access.
landing.howStep3Desc: Trigger ambience and effects with one click while you run the game.
landing.interfaceDesc: A clear layout with sound buttons, volume sliders, and ambience controls so Game Masters can run audio without breaking flow.
landing.pricingSubheading: Start free and upgrade when you need more.
landing.pricingPlayerDesc: Designed for players who want a simple soundboard.
landing.plansSubheading: Start free and upgrade when you need more scenes, storage, and uploads.
landing.faq2Question: Can I upload my own sounds?
landing.faq2Answer: Yes. You can add sounds via URL (e.g. YouTube or direct audio links) or upload your own files.
landing.faq3Question: Do I need an account to try it?
landing.faq3Answer: No. You can continue as a guest and use the soundboard with data stored locally in your browser. Sign in to save and sync across devices.
landing.faq4Question: Is it designed for Game Masters?
landing.faq4Answer: Yes. SoundQuest is built for tabletop RPG sessions so GMs can play ambience, music, and sound effects instantly without interrupting the game.
landing.ctaHeadline: Start Enhancing Your RPG Sessions Today
landing.ctaSubtext: Create a free account or try as a guest.
landing.footerDescription: SoundQuest is a soundboard platform built to help tabletop RPG players create immersive adventures using music and ambient sound.
support.title: Support SoundQuest
support.intro: SoundQuest is a free open-source tool for RPG sessions. If it helps your table, consider supporting the project.
support.payWithCardAria: Pay with card via Stripe (opens in new tab)
support.payWithPixAria: Pay with Pix (opens in new tab)
support.pixQrHint: Scan the QR code or tap the button below to pay with Pix.
login.tagline: Create the perfect sound space for every RPG session.
login.demoNotice: Configure Supabase (see .env). Using demo mode: data is stored in this browser only.
login.continueLocalStorageAria: Continue with local storage, no account required
login.addSupabaseEnv: Add Supabase env vars to enable Google sign-in.
login.continueAsGuest: Continue as guest (use app without signing in)
login.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check console and ensure Supabase is configured.
loginVerify.title: Two-factor verification
loginVerify.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the Google Authenticator app (or another compatible app).
loginVerify.noAuthenticator: No authenticator configured. Set up Google Authenticator first.
loginEnroll.title: Set up Google Authenticator
loginEnroll.scanQR: Scan the QR code with the Google Authenticator app (or Authy, etc.) or enter the code manually.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description or labels…
dashboard.deleteSceneConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scene "{title}"? All audio will be removed and this action cannot be undone.
scene.noAudios: No audios in this scene. Use the + button to add one.
scene.deleteSoundConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
sceneForm.title: Title
addSound.title: 🔊 Add sound
addSound.name: Name
addSound.urlLabel: URL (YouTube or MP3/WAV/OGG audio) or upload — max. 25 MB
addSound.orChooseFile: Or choose a file on your computer:
addSound.nameRequired: Name is required (or choose a file to use its name)
addSound.enterUrlOrFile: Enter a URL (YouTube or audio {extensions}) or choose a file
addSound.urlMustBeValid: URL must be a YouTube link or an audio file ({extensions}).
addSound.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxMb} MB.
addSound.spotifyHelp: Paste a Spotify link (track, album, playlist or episode). Requires Spotify account.
addSound.spotifyUrlInvalid: Invalid Spotify link. Use a track, album, playlist or episode URL.
spotifyTest.title: Test: Add music by Spotify link
spotifyTest.description: Paste a Spotify link (track, album, playlist or episode) and click "Add" to test. Works with free Spotify account. You must be logged into Spotify in the browser.
spotifyTest.emptyMessage: No songs added yet. Paste a Spotify link above and click Add.
addSound.signInToUpload: Sign in to upload your own files. You can still add sounds via URL or Freesound.
freesound.title: 🔍 Search Freesound
freesound.notConfiguredMiddle: to search and add sounds from
freesound.queryHelp: Query: Terms or tags (e.g. rpg, fantasy, ambience) - search matches tags, name, and description. Use -term to exclude. Filter (optional): Type tags as words (e.g. fantasy rpg ambience);
freesound.filterPlaceholder: Filter (optional): e.g. fantasy rpg or dungeon
freesound.addFailed: Could not add sound to the scene.
freesound.errorApiKeyNotConfigured: Freesound is not configured. Add the API key in .env to search sounds.
freesound.errorTimeout: The search took too long. Please try again.
freesound.errorNetwork: Could not reach Freesound. Check your connection and try again.
freesound.errorApi: Freesound is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
